approved_for: P0A task and manifest contract freeze

split_contract.validation: Derive approximately 10% per class from Train, grouped by reconstructed source_video_id.
split_contract.leakage_rule: No source_video_id may cross train and validation.
split_contract.unresolved_rule: Keep unresolved source-video mappings outside compliant manifests in a separate quarantine report.

headline.name: official-interval-derived event-only 14-label evaluation
headline.membership: Inside-interval anomalous test frames plus frames from official Normal test videos.

sensitivity.name: full-directory inherited-label noisy proxy
sensitivity.membership: Complete Kaggle Test folders with inherited folder labels.

manifest_contract.format: UTF-8 CSV with the exact header and stable row ordering

null_semantics.source_frame_index: null only when the native asset has no applicable frame index; unresolved required mappings are quarantined instead
null_semantics.inside_official_interval: null for training, Normal, external-task, and not-yet-mapped rows; boolean is required for mapped anomalous UCF test rows

manifest_contract.index_base: Declared per annotation release and mapping artifact during P0B; never inferred silently

teacher_boundary.checkpoint_identity: Store exact checkpoint/version/digest in the provenance record referenced by the run or derived artifact.

prohibited_claims: Folder labels are frame-level event ground truth.
Official intervals are clean or exhaustive ground truth.
Teacher ROIs are independent localization ground truth.
Task-native metrics can be ranked as one common score.
